name: DDE Service Information Properties
abstract: Conditional extension for service resources. Implements SV_ServiceIdentification (DDE spec Table 2): serviceType (mandatory), containsOperations, accessProperties, operatedDataset, and endpointDescription. Defines properties: schema:distribution, schema:dataset, schema:additionalProperty. Uses building blocks: additionalProperty (schemaorgProperties), definedTerm (schemaorgProperties), identifier (schemaorgProperties).
